ground_truth.title: How to Garden - Gardening Basics for Beginners | Garden Design
ground_truth.main_content:
How To Garden - Learn how to plant and care for vegetables, flowers, and more—even if you're a beginning gardener. Gardening is about finding the right combination of sunlight, fertile soil, and water to make your plants thrive. It's also about fulfilling your passion, so select plants you love.

GARDENING BASICS: Beginning gardeners are often intimidated by the process of how to start a garden and care for it successfully—after all, there's a lot involved. From amending your soil with high-quality organic matter to pruning shrubs, you'll find answers and advice for essential gardening tasks. Topics include Garden Soil 101, Garden Fertilizer 101, Composting 101, Mulch 101, Irrigation 101, How to Prune Shrubs & Perennials, A Gardener's Guide to Deadheading, How to Use Neem Oil, How to Grow Plants from Seed, How to Create a Container Planting, 12 Essential Garden Tools, How to Care for Garden Tools, Organic Gardening Basics, How to Water Your Summer Garden, and How & When to Divide Perennials.

PESTS, DISEASES, & OTHER GARDEN PROBLEMS: Learn how to safely and naturally deal with common pests, diseases, and weeds that can wreak havoc on your garden. Topics include Deer-Resistant Plants & Strategies, Natural Ways to Get Rid of Aphids, 12 Mosquito Repellent Plants, Getting Rid of Grub Worms Naturally, Identify and Control Spider Mites, How to Get Rid of Powdery Mildew, Get Rid of Garden Slugs & Snails, Treat & Prevent Black Spot, and Protect Your Garden From Rabbits.

HOW TO GROW ANNUALS, PERENNIALS, SHRUBS, BULBS: Learn how to grow different types of plants and their uses in the garden. Understand the differences between them and what growing conditions they do best in. Topics include How to Grow Annuals, How to Grow Perennials, How to Grow Shrubs, Annuals vs Perennials, and Bulbs 101 - Planting & Storing.

HOW TO GROW VEGETABLES & HERBS: Many beginning gardeners find the process of growing their own food rewarding, and not as difficult as they anticipated. Topics include How to Start a Vegetable Garden, Container Vegetable Gardening, Raised Bed Gardens, 16 Spring Vegetables, Indoor & Outdoor Herb Gardens, and 15 Best Herbs to Grow at Home.

HOW TO GROW GORGEOUS FLOWERS: Starting a flower garden doesn't have to be daunting—whether you choose to grow from seed or young plants. Topics include How to Start a Flower Garden, 21 Easiest Flowers for Beginners, and A Beginner's Guide to Rose Care.

HOW TO GARDEN INDOORS: When winter arrives, your gardening doesn't have to stop. Topics include 21 Best Indoor Plants, Top 10 Terrarium Tips, How to Design a Window Garden, How to Force Flowering Branches, and Forcing Indoor Bulbs.

GARDEN-INSPIRED DIY PROJECTS: Looking for a fun project? Get how to info for using flowers, branches, and other items from your garden to create clothing, décor, and more. Topics include 12 Easy Garden DIYs, Sun Printing, and Flower Arranging 101.

COMMON GARDENING TERMS: Basic plant types including Annual, Perennial, Shrub, Evergreen, Deciduous, Zone, Exposure (Full sun, Partial sun/shade, Full shade, Dappled shade), Habit (Climbing, Clump forming, Mounded, Spreading, Trailing, Upright), Height & spread, First or last frost date, Native plants, and Invasive plants.
with: Gardening is about finding the right combination of sunlight, fertile soil, and water to make your plants thrive.
Beginning gardeners are often intimidated by the process of how to start a garden and care for it successfully—after all, there's a lot involved.
Learn how to safely and naturally deal with common pests, diseases, and weeds that can wreak havoc on your garden.
Many beginning gardeners find the process of growing their own food rewarding, and not as difficult as they anticipated.
When winter arrives, your gardening doesn't have to stop. Try your hand at growing a few plants indoors and you'll find that it isn't too hard.
